These are type aliases! Now I need to see what these actually alias - they likely wrap function signatures. Let me check one of them:

part.text:
---
## Goal
- Add `ctx context.Context` parameter to all `NewRepository` functions across the repository while maintaining type-checking compatibility

## Constraints & Preferences
- Refactor session repository code (session, iam, password, oidc, authtoken, credential/static, server packages)
- Ensure project still typechecks after changes
- Add context.Context parameter specifically to NewRepository function calls

## Progress
### Done
- Identified 18+ NewRepository definitions across auth/session/iam/credential/server packages
- Confirmed session.NewRepository signature: `func NewRepository(r db.Reader, w db.Writer, kms *kms.Kms, opt ...Option) (*Repository, error)`
- Discovered interface types (SessionRepoFactory) that wrap repository factory functions
- Found 52+ references including test files and production code callers

### In Progress
- Analyzing caller packages using factory pattern (internal/daemon/controller, internal/server, internal/scheduler)
- Identifying all unique NewRepository definition locations across repository
- Preparing to systematically add ctx parameter to each definition

### Blocked
- Type constraints on interfaces like SessionRepoFactory may complicate adding context parameter
- Need to verify which callers directly invoke vs. use factory function patterns

## Key Decisions
- [none]

## Next Steps
- Add `ctx context.Context` parameter to all NewRepository function definitions
- Update all callers to pass context where appropriate
- Modify interface types to be compatible with new function signatures
- Run type-checking validation across affected packages
- Address compilation errors related to factory function type constraints

## Critical Context
- Some callers use factoryFunc patterns that wrap repo creation (e.g., internal/daemon/controller)
- There are 52+ references including test files in packages like credential/vault_test, daemon/cluster/handlers_test
- Type constraint issues exist where func() (*Repository, error) cannot satisfy SessionRepoFactory type
- Need to update both the repository creation functions and their interface wrappers

## Relevant Files
- `/private/var/folders/9f/txt0j2rs2wx3lqx9vfj9x3240000gn/T/BenchmarkRenameqwen3.5-9b-udq4boundary_eb61ac63semantic1851989574/002/boundary/internal/session/repository.go:25:6` (NewRepository definition)
- `/private/var/folders/9f/txt0j2rs2wx3lqx9vfj9x3240000gn/T/BenchmarkRenameqwen3.5-9b-udq4boundary_eb61ac63semantic1851989574/002/boundary/internal/daemon/controller/common/common.go:28:2` (SessionRepoFactory type)
- `/private/var/folders/9f/txt0j2rs2wx3lqx9vfj9x3240000gn/T/BenchmarkRenameqwen3.5-9b-udq4boundary_eb61ac63semantic1851989574/002/boundary/internal/auth/password/repository.go:25:6` (NewRepository definition)

- `/private/var/folders/9f/txt0j2rs2wx3lqx9vfj9x3240000gn/T/BenchmarkRenameqwen3.5-9b-udq4boundary_eb61ac63semantic1851989574/002/boundary/internal/authtoken/repository.go:34:6` (NewRepository definition)
